title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.37.0 to 1.38.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.37.0 to 1.38.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.38.0

What's Changed

  • Bump to v1.37.0 by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1031
  • Allow setting quota for individual containers by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1035
  • Tell users who change graphroot location to fix the SELinux labels by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1038
  • store: lock graphLock during Diff by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1037
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.8.5 to 1.9.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1039
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.8.22 to 0.9.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1040
  • Support /usr/share/containers/storage.conf by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1042
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/go-winio from 0.5.0 to 0.5.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1045
  • Fix: relative path will result infinite loop by @​chenk008 in containers/storage#1047
  • Add data about relabeling homedir by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1046
  • fixes garbled symlink error by @​wgahnagl in containers/storage#1048
  • chunked: fix another occurrence of linkat by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1052
  • build(deps): bump github.com/moby/sys/mountinfo from 0.4.1 to 0.5.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1053
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.9.0 to 0.10.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1054
  • overlay.get: if we're ignoring metacopy=on, ignore it when it's global by @​nalind in containers/storage#1049
  • pkg/chunked, pkg/idtools: adjust error message by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1055
  • [CI:DOCS] Clearup inheritance rules for storage.conf by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1050
  • idtools: fix ToHost conversion by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1057
  • reexec.Command(): panic if reexec.Init() wasn't called by @​nalind in containers/storage#1058
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.0 to 0.9.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1059
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.10.0 to 0.10.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1063
  • Use math/rand.Rand.Read to generate slices of random data by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1066
  • reexec: mark us as initialized when calling initializers by @​nalind in containers/storage#1067
  • store.DeleteImage: correctly account for mapped layers by @​nalind in containers/storage#1062
  • overlay: chown only newly created directories by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1069
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.9.1 to 1.10.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1070
  • overlay: silence metacopy warning by @​vrothberg in containers/storage#1071
  • .cirrus.yml: bump Fedora version by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1074
  • chunked: various improvements by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1072
  • chunked: add fallback for openat2 by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1075
  • archive: ignore the security.selinux xattr by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1077
  • Vagrantfile: remove by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1081
  • Reset defaultConfigFile if defaultOverrideConfigFile exits. by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1080
  • options: fall back to default graph and run root for empty case by @​flouthoc in containers/storage#1083
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.0.2 to 1.0.3 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1085
  • Make homedir functions work on Windows by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1084
  • idtools: support libsubid 4 by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1086
  • layerStore.Diff(): don't add an unnecessary buffer by @​nalind in containers/storage#1087
  • User are reporting potential issues with using overlay2 by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#966
  • build: fix libsubid test by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1089
  • chunked: various improvements by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1092
  • GetStore modifications, Create GetLocalStorageConfig and SaveLocalStorageConfig by @​cdoern in containers/storage#1096
  • pkg: idtools: export RawTo{Container,Host} by @​cyphar in containers/storage#1101
  • build(deps): bump github.com/BurntSushi/toml from 0.4.1 to 1.0.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1103
  • pkg/chunked: add support for sparse files by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1102
  • build(deps): bump github.com/valyala/gozstd from 1.14.2 to 1.15.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1105
  • store: use system.EnsureRemoveAll to rm container by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1106
  • revert usage of github.com/valyala/gozstd by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1107

... (truncated)

Commits
  • cf9a104 Bump to v1.38.0
  • 832a2d6 Merge pull request #1110 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/Mic...
  • ee84a1d build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.1 to 0.9.2
  • 71e8e0a Merge pull request #1109 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/kla...
  • 3a3f531 Merge pull request #1108 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/ope...
  • 6c71b26 build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.13.6 to 1.14.1
  • 870e8fe build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.0.3 to 1.1.0
  • e9e09bf Merge pull request #1107 from giuseppe/revert-zstd-encoder
  • 9e9783d Revert "vendor add valyala/gozstd"
  • 19ea630 Revert "archive: use valyala/gozstd"
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
